title: Online Class 网课学习
scene: 学生与老师在线课堂互动

lines.speaker: Student
lines.line: Good morning, Ms. Lee. I am having trouble with today's grammar lesson.
lines.trans: 早上好，李老师。今天的语法课我有点跟不上。

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.line: Good morning, Tom. Which part is confusing you? The present perfect tense?
lines.trans: 早上好，Tom。哪部分让你困惑？是现在完成时吗？

lines.speaker: Student
lines.line: Yes, I do not know when to use "have been" and "have gone".
lines.trans: 是的，我不知道什么时候用"have been"，什么时候用"have gone"。

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.line: Great question. "Have been" means you visited and came back. "Have gone" means you are still there.
lines.trans: 好问题。"Have been"表示你去过并已回来。"Have gone"表示你还在那里。

lines.speaker: Student
lines.line: Oh, I see. So if my dad is at the office, I say he has gone to work?
lines.trans: 哦，我明白了。那如果我爸爸在办公室，我说他has gone to work？

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.line: Exactly! And if he came back, you say he has been to work today.
lines.trans: 完全正确！如果他回来了，你就说he has been to work today。

lines.speaker: Student
lines.line: That makes sense. Can you send me the practice worksheet?
lines.trans: 明白了。您能把练习作业发给我吗？

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.line: Sure, I will upload it to the class folder after this session.
lines.trans: 当然，这节课结束后我会上传到班级文件夹。

lines.speaker: Student
lines.line: Thank you so much. I will review it tonight.
lines.trans: 非常感谢。我今晚就复习。

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.line: You are doing great. Keep it up!
